mainEntity.name: Q9. How do your plans work?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI Visibility offers three plans: Monthly, Quarterly, and Annual. Each plan includes done-for-you AI visibility setup, AI-readable structured data and publishing, FAQ/Q&A creation, visibility gap analysis, and publishing across trusted platforms. The Quarterly and Annual plans offer more comprehensive services, including long-term authority growth, continuous expansion, and additional content layers, with the Annual plan providing the best value for compounding results.
